title: ProxyAnalytics
description: The best way to get info about your players!
body:
**🧠 ProxyAnalytics: Real-Time Minecraft Server Insight Redefined**

ProxyAnalytics is a sleek and powerful plugin designed to provide comprehensive real-time analytics for Minecraft server proxies (Velocity support only). Whether you’re running a large network or managing a growing community, ProxyAnalytics equips you with everything needed to track, understand, and optimize player behavior and server performance — all from a responsive, dark-themed web dashboard.

**⚙️ Features & Configuration Overview**

The heart of ProxyAnalytics lies in its flexible and robust configuration, allowing server admins to tailor it to their needs. Here's what it offers under the hood:

**📊 Dashboard Highlights**

    Live Player Count: Instantly see how many players are connected.

    Peak Player Stats: Know the busiest times on your server and plan accordingly.

    Total Playtime Tracking: Gain insights into how engaged your players are.

    Server Uptime Monitor: Stay aware of server stability and performance.

    Top Players Leaderboard: See who's racking up the most time online.

    Dont lose progress because u closed the tab! The plugin has a built in backup to load previous data
**
🧰 Settings Customization**

From the config.json file:

    Refresh Interval: Data updates every 1 second, ensuring high precision.

    Data Retention: Keeps analytics data for up to 365 days for long-term insight.

    Max Top Players: Highlights the top 10 players by playtime.

    Max Entries: Logs up to 100,000 entries, supporting even the busiest servers.

    ^^^ all of these are customizable!

**🌐 Web Dashboard (at a localhost:8850)**

The dashboard is beautifully crafted using html and js

    Cleanly presented stats cards for Online Players, Peak Players, Uptime, and Playtime

    Interactive charts showing:

        Really really fast updates ( every 1-5 seconds to ensure maximum player count accuracy )

        Player Count History with adjustable timeframes (24h, 7d, 30d, 1y)

        Top Player Playtime ranking for competitiveness and community engagement

    Responsive and mobile-friendly layout

    A rich icon set courtesy of Font Awesome enhances the visual clarity

**🎨 Theme & Style**

    Dark Theme: Reduces eye strain and looks great on modern displays.

    Minimalist Interface: Prioritizes essential data with no clutter.

    Dashboard Port: Runs on port 8580 and can be toggled via enabled flag.
**
🚀 Velocity Proxy Integration**

Built with Velocity support in mind:

    Stat tracking can be toggled independently from display.

    Lightweight and optimized for real-time usage without introducing server lag.

    Acts passively, monitoring traffic and sessions while respecting privacy (no external stat sharing by default).

**📈 Use Cases**

    Server Administrators: Monitor load, track trends, and anticipate scaling needs.

    Community Managers: Spot your most loyal players and active hours.

    Developers: Use historical data to debug traffic spikes or performance dips.

**🔐 Privacy & Performance**

    All data is stored locally – no third-party integrations or unwanted sharing.

    Engineered to be lightweight with minimal memory footprint.

    Perfect for performance-critical environments or sensitive networks.

**📦 Conclusion**

ProxyAnalytics isn’t just a plugin — it’s a complete analytics ecosystem built for Minecraft proxies. With its real-time dashboard, long-term tracking, and lightweight footprint, it provides unmatched insight and control. Whether you’re optimizing performance or simply keeping tabs on your community, ProxyAnalytics is your ultimate ally.
